reviews.author: Amir Goldstein
reviews.summary: Reviewer expressed skepticism about the quality of the code, referencing past issues in ovl_setattr(), and requested no formal review
reviews.raw_body:
Wow this code brings back memories that I tried hard to forget :)
I hope that fuse passthrough can reap the benefits of all the bugs
and fixes in ovl_setattr()...

Reviewed-by: Amir Goldstein <amir73il@gmail.com>

2026-05-17.patch_summary: This patch adds a generic function called backing_inode_setattr() to handle setattr operations on backing inodes. The function is responsible for updating the attributes of the underlying inode, while also handling locking and write access. This allows other filesystems that use backing inodes (such as fuse passthrough) to reuse this logic. The patch moves the existing ovl_setattr() function's logic into this new generic function, making it easier to maintain and extend.
